evidence: Join-clips core still centers on `JoinClipsTaskCompatParams` (mixed modern + legacy + video-edit fields) and normalization branches (`resolveClipSource`, `resolveVideoEditConfig`, mode/shape guards) in `src/shared/lib/tasks/joinClips.ts` lines 138-390.

Deprecated compatibility API `createJoinClipsTask` remains exported in `src/shared/lib/tasks/joinClips.ts` lines 653-660, and tests still heavily exercise compatibility permutations in `src/shared/lib/tasks/__tests__/joinClips.test.ts` lines 96-224.

Task payload readers still perform multi-source fallback ladders (taskViewContract/orchestratorDetails/raw params) in `src/shared/components/TaskDetails/VideoTravelDetails.tsx` lines 76-174 and `src/shared/lib/tasks/individualTravelSegment.ts` lines 306-396, including explicit legacy fallback comments.

UI orchestration still passes very large prop surfaces across gallery/lightbox boundaries (e.g., `MediaGalleryLightbox` callsite with many state setters and workflow props in `src/shared/components/MediaGallery/index.tsx` lines 639-681; render-model-to-panel prop bags in `src/shared/components/MediaLightbox/hooks/useVideoLightboxRenderModel.tsx` lines 49-147).
Deprecated legacy Supabase facade remains first-class exported in `src/integrations/supabase/legacy/index.ts` lines 1-11, preserving dual client surfaces even with migration guardrails.

Most task-creation modules now consistently normalize and rethrow via `handleError`/`handleAndRethrow` (e.g., `src/shared/lib/tasks/imageGeneration.ts:447-449`, `src/shared/lib/tasks/magicEdit.ts:218-220`, `src/shared/lib/tasks/joinClips.ts:606-608`, `src/shared/lib/tasks/individualTravelSegment.ts:748-750`).

Previously flagged billing paths are now explicit and policy-driven (`supabase/functions/calculate-task-cost/index.ts:301-309` returns `subtask_query_failed`; `supabase/functions/complete_task/orchestrator.ts:67-95,136-182,566-585` classifies and persists billing outcomes).

Remaining inconsistency appears at boundary layers: local storage failures are downgraded to fallback control flow in auth routing/sign-in (`src/app/routes.tsx:41-49`, `src/pages/Home/hooks/useDiscordSignIn.ts:10-17`), and generation completion wraps all failures into a generic `Error` string envelope (`supabase/functions/complete_task/generation.ts:259-268`).
error_consistency.issues_preventing_higher_score: Client auth storage failures and generation-completion errors still use non-uniform downgrade/wrapping policies versus the newer explicit outcome-based patterns.

findings.summary: Join-clips creation still routes through a mixed compatibility parameter bag, so legacy and modern contracts remain coupled in core logic.
evidence: `JoinClipsTaskCompatParams` includes modern fields (`clip_source`, `video_edit`) plus legacy top-level fields (`starting_video_path`, `video_edit_mode`, `source_video_url`, etc.) in `joinClips.ts` lines 138-153.
Core normalization still performs compatibility inference and mode-shape branching in `joinClips.ts` lines 263-383.
Deprecated adapter `createJoinClipsTask` is still exported and forwards directly to core in `joinClips.ts` lines 653-660.
Tests continue to validate compatibility ladders (`clips` vs legacy paths precedence and mixed-shape behavior) in `joinClips.test.ts` lines 163-224.
findings.suggestion: Split the core executor to accept only canonical mode-specific inputs, move legacy shape conversion into a dedicated migration adapter module, and restrict compatibility tests to adapter coverage so core tests enforce canonical contracts only.

findings.summary: Video-travel consumers still rely on contract-plus-legacy fallback ladders instead of a single canonical read interface.
evidence: `VideoTravelDetails` resolves key fields through chained fallbacks across `taskViewContract`, `orchestratorDetails`, and `rawParams` (e.g., phase config, prompts, structure video fields) at lines 87-174.
`individualTravelSegment` builds state from multiple payload locations for most core settings (`modelName`, `guidance`, prompts, fps, motion mode) at lines 306-396.
Legacy-path fallback remains explicit for child lookup strategy in `individualTravelSegment.ts` line 698 comment and related query flow.

`payloadBuilder` still includes cleanup pass `stripLegacyStructureParams(...)` after constructing payload (`payloadBuilder.ts` lines 214-216), indicating canonicalization is still downstream repair rather than strict boundary input.
findings.suggestion: Create a single normalized travel payload DTO (with required/optional canonical fields) produced once at task creation and consumed by both UI detail renderers and segment builders; isolate legacy extraction to one translator and ban direct raw/orchestrator fallback reads in consumers.

findings.summary: Gallery/lightbox orchestration still depends on broad prop tunneling, keeping ownership boundaries diffuse.
evidence: `MediaGallery` passes a very large prop set into `MediaGalleryLightbox` including state setters, workflow callbacks, task details, and optimistic mutation controls (`index.tsx` lines 639-681).

`useVideoLightboxRenderModel` fans out large component prop bags into `VideoEditPanel` and `InfoPanel` (lines 49-100) and maintains long dependency arrays tied to those broad prop surfaces (lines 102-147).
`LightboxLayout` composes additional workflow bags via spread (`workflowBarProps`) and appends contextual fields (lines 206-218), continuing cross-layer prop ownership blending.
findings.suggestion: Introduce a bounded lightbox controller/view-model contract (single object + action interface) per panel, and move translation at boundary adapters so leaf components stop receiving cross-domain prop bags.

findings.summary: Deprecated Supabase legacy facade is still an active exported abstraction, preserving dual access surfaces.
evidence: `src/integrations/supabase/legacy/index.ts` still publicly re-exports `supabase` and `getLegacySupabaseClient` (line 11) despite deprecation metadata.

Other reviewed modules already use canonical `getSupabaseClient` (`useGenerationMutations.ts` line 3, `individualTravelSegment.ts` line 8), so the legacy export now mostly adds an alternate abstraction path rather than needed behavior.
findings.suggestion: Demote the legacy module to a non-default migration shim (no broad barrel export), gate usage to explicit allowlisted adapters only, and remove direct `supabase` re-export to force canonical client acquisition.

findings.summary: Auth-related localStorage failures are logged but converted into normal-flow fallbacks, hiding state-corruption signals from callers.
evidence: `hasStoredSession()` catches storage errors and returns `false`, forcing unauthenticated redirect semantics without propagating failure (`src/app/routes.tsx:41-49`).
`useDiscordSignIn()` catches `localStorage.setItem` errors, logs via `handleError`, then continues OAuth startup (`src/pages/Home/hooks/useDiscordSignIn.ts:10-19`).

Sibling auth flow `useAuthReferralFinalize()` uses structured `OperationResult` for failure reporting (`src/pages/Home/hooks/auth/useAuthReferralFinalize.ts:18-53`), creating mixed contracts inside auth-adjacent flows.
findings.suggestion: Standardize auth-storage boundary handling: return a typed recoverable error/result (e.g., `operationFailure` with `storage_unavailable`) from both route/session probing and OAuth intent caching, and let callers decide whether to continue degraded flow or block with explicit UX.

findings.summary: Generation completion converts heterogeneous failures into a generic error string envelope instead of preserving structured failure metadata used elsewhere in completion/billing flows.
evidence: `createGenerationFromTask()` catches all errors and rethrows `new Error('[GenMigration] ...')` (`supabase/functions/complete_task/generation.ts:259-268`), collapsing domain error kinds into message text.

Adjacent completion logic has explicit machine-readable policy objects and fields (`status`, `recoverable`, `error_code`, reconciliation flags) in orchestrator billing handling (`supabase/functions/complete_task/orchestrator.ts:67-115,579-585`).

Cost calculation endpoint similarly returns explicit `errorResponse` codes (`subtask_query_failed`, `cost_record_check_failed`) rather than message-only errors (`supabase/functions/calculate-task-cost/index.ts:301-309,352-356`).
findings.suggestion: Introduce a shared completion error envelope (code + recoverable + context + cause) for `complete_task` modules and throw/return that type from generation routing instead of generic `Error` strings.
